case_title: MONICA POBLETE GUARD. AD LITEM FOR SOPHIA POBLETE VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MONICA POBLETE GUARD. AD LITEM FOR SOPHIA POBLETE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AMPCO SYSTEM PARKING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-08-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
PETITION OF MINOR PLAINTIFF/DEFENDANT APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM; ACCEPTANCE; AND ORDER OF COURT SIGNED JUNE 12, 2006. MOTHER APPOINTED.
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO CT CORP. SYSTEM, AGENT FOR SERVICE AMPCO SYSTEM PARKING.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONICA POBLETE GUARD. AD LITEM FOR SOPHIA POBLETE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AMPCO SYSTEM PARKING $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $585.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AMPCO SYSTEM PARKING
